# Analyze Thread

Analyze Codex, Claude Code, or Cursor threads, transcripts, and transcriptions. Use for thread analysis, transcript review, conversation audits, agent-performance diagnosis, comparing sessions, finding loops or corrections, and extracting decisions, outcomes, evidence, and actionable improvements.

## Installation

Part of the `vs` plugin — see the repo README for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor install instructions. Every skill is self-contained, so you can also copy this directory straight into your agent's skills folder.

## Structure

```
vs-analyze-thread/
  SKILL.md                         # Skill definition
  scripts/normalize-transcript.mjs # Codex, Claude, JSON, and Markdown normalizer
```
